text.en: Yann LeCun and collaborators showed that convolutional networks trained by backpropagation could read handwritten ZIP codes. LeNet became a defining example of end-to-end convolutional perception.
text.zh: 扬·勒昆及合作者证明，用反向传播训练的卷积网络可以识别手写邮编。LeNet 成为端到端卷积感知系统的标志性案例。

text.en: Backpropagation Applied to Handwritten Zip Code Recognition
text.zh: 反向传播应用于手写邮编识别
